generated_oml:
{
    instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Measured motor current data from the physical twin"
        DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrent
    ]

    instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom MeasuredMotorCurrentSensor
    ]

    instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Measured motor angle data from the primary encoder"
        DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorAngle
    ]

    instance MeasuredMotorAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    ]

    instance MeasuredOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Measured output angle data from the secondary encoder behind the gearbox"
        DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredOutputAngle
    ]

    instance MeasuredOutputAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    ]

    instance ReferenceValuesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Reference values stream from the CNC controller"
        DTDFVocab:fromData ReferenceValuesStream
    ]

    instance ReferenceValuesStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIKController
    ]

    instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from motor current measurements"
        DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    ]

    instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Derived angular velocity data from motor and output angle measurements"
        DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorAngleData, MeasuredOutputAngleData
    ]

    instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Derived angular acceleration data from velocity measurements"
        DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
    ]

    instance SimulatedFrictionInclusiveData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Simulated data including friction effects from white-box and black-box models"
        DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionWhiteBoxModelOutput, FrictionBlackBoxModelOutput
    ]

    instance SimulatedFrictionlessData : DTDFVocab:Data [
        base:desc "Simulated gearbox data without friction for comparison"
        DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxBaseModelOutput
    ]

    instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
        base:desc "SysML structural model of the first axis including motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
        DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
    ]

    instance FrictionWhiteBoxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
        base:desc "Analytical white-box friction model implemented in Simulink"
        DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
    ]

    instance FrictionBlackBoxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
        base:desc "Data-driven black-box friction model implemented in Simulink"
        DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
    ]

    instance GearboxBaseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
        base:desc "Base gearbox model without friction for comparison purposes"
        DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
    ]

    instance TorqueCalculationProcessing : DTDFVocab:Model [
        base:desc "Processing model for torque calculation from current measurements"
        DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
    ]

    instance PositionTrackingProcessing : DTDFVocab:Model [
        base:desc "Processing model for position tracking and backlash compensation"
        DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
    ]

    instance FrictionWhiteBoxModelOutput : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom FrictionWhiteBoxModel
    ]

    instance FrictionBlackBoxModelOutput : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom FrictionBlackBoxModel
    ]

    instance GearboxBaseModelOutput : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
        DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxBaseModel
    ]

    instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
        base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time data streaming from physical twin to digital shadow"
        DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
    ]

    instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
        base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of the robot axis components"
        DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
    ]

    instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
        base:desc "MATLAB Simulink tool for implementing and executing system models"
        DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService, SimulationService
    ]

    instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
        base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework for structuring digital twin components"
        DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
    ]

    instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
        base:desc "Service for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital twin"
        DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
    ]

    instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
        base:desc "Service for structural modeling and analysis of the robot axis"
        DTDFVocab:provides StructuralAnalysisInsight
    ]

    instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
        base:desc "Service for friction modeling and analysis using white-box and black-box approaches"
        DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight, ModelRefinementAction
    ]

    instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
        base:desc "Service for executing system simulations with and without friction"
        DTDFVocab:provides SimulationComparisonInsight
    ]

    instance PositionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
        base:desc "Service for position accuracy analysis and backlash compensation"
        DTDFVocab:provides PositionAccuracyInsight
    ]

    instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
        base:desc "Service for managing asset metadata and configuration"
        DTDFVocab:provides AssetDescriptionInsight
    ]

    instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
        base:desc "Insight into data transmission quality and latency"
    ]

    instance StructuralAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
        base:desc "Insight into structural composition and component interactions"
    ]

    instance FrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
        base:desc "Insight into friction characteristics (static, kinetic, viscous)"
    ]

    instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
        base:desc "Action to refine friction models based on analysis results"
        DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    ]

    instance SimulationComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
        base:desc "Insight comparing simulated (friction-inclusive) with measured data"
    ]

    instance PositionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
        base:desc "Insight into position accuracy and backlash effects"
    ]

    instance AssetDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
        base:desc "Insight into asset metadata and configuration"
    ]

    instance MeasuredMotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
        base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M)"
        DTDFVocab:producedData MeasuredMotorCurrent
    ]

    instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
        base:desc "Primary encoder mounted on the motor shaft"
        DTDFVocab:producedData MeasuredMotorAngle
    ]

    instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
        base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox for output position measurement"
        DTDFVocab:producedData MeasuredOutputAngle
    ]

    instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
        base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing reference values"
        DTDFVocab:producedData ReferenceValuesStream
    ]

    instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
        base:contains MeasuredMotorCurrentData, MeasuredMotorAngleData,
                    MeasuredOutputAngleData, ReferenceValuesData,
                    DerivedTorqueData, DerivedVelocityData,
                    DerivedAccelerationData, SimulatedFrictionInclusiveData,
                    SimulatedFrictionlessData, SysMLStructuralModel,
                    FrictionWhiteBoxModel, FrictionBlackBoxModel,
                    GearboxBaseModel, TorqueCalculationProcessing,
                    PositionTrackingProcessing, MQTTProtocol,
                    SysMLTool, SimulinkTool, AssetAdministrationShell,
                    DataStreamingService, StructuralModelingService,
                    FrictionModelingService, SimulationService,
                    PositionAnalysisService, AssetManagementService,
                    DataTransmissionInsight, StructuralAnalysisInsight,
                    FrictionAnalysisInsight, ModelRefinementAction,
                    SimulationComparisonInsight, PositionAccuracyInsight,
                    AssetDescriptionInsight, MeasuredMotorCurrentSensor,
                    MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SINUMERIKController,
                    FrictionWhiteBoxModelOutput, FrictionBlackBoxModelOutput,
                    GearboxBaseModelOutput
    ]

    instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
        base:desc "Physical twin representing the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
        base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
        DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalTwinEnvironment
    ]

    instance MeasuredMotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Component [
        base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwin
    ]
}
